name: Paula's Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and shortening until smooth.
2. Add the pumpkin and beaten egg, mixing well after each addition.
3. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, spices) and add them to the mixture in three additions, stirring gently after each addition.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. If desired, stir in raisins and nuts.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
